# Svg

Rank genes by spatial autocorrelation or spatial variance. Always report FDR-adjusted p-values when available.

**10 registered method(s)** in this category.

| Method | Maturity | Implementation | Summary | Guide |
|--------|----------|----------------|---------|-------|
| `weave_anisotropy_svg` | `experimental` | `native` | Directional spatial association contrast across four orientation sectors. | [weave_anisotropy_svg](../generated/weave_anisotropy_svg.md) |
| `weave_bootstrap_robust_svg` | `experimental` | `native` | Spatial association ranked by deterministic bootstrap stability. | [weave_bootstrap_robust_svg](../generated/weave_bootstrap_robust_svg.md) |
| `weave_boundary_svg` | `experimental` | `native` | Genes whose local expression jumps coincide with multigene spatial boundaries. | [weave_boundary_svg](../generated/weave_boundary_svg.md) |
| `weave_hotspot_svg` | `experimental` | `native` | Local high/low expression concentration measured without a global domain model. | [weave_hotspot_svg](../generated/weave_hotspot_svg.md) |
| `weave_multiscale_svg` | `experimental` | `native` | Spatial association aggregated across short, medium, and long neighbourhoods. | [weave_multiscale_svg](../generated/weave_multiscale_svg.md) |
| `gearys_c` | `production` | `native` | Per-gene Geary C converted to a positive spatial-association score. | [gearys_c](../generated/gearys_c.md) |
| `morans_i` | `production` | `native` | Per-gene Moran's I spatial autocorrelation on a k-NN graph. | [morans_i](../generated/morans_i.md) |
| `nnsvg` | `production` | `native` | nnSVG nearest-neighbour Gaussian-process SVG detection (Bioconductor). | [nnsvg](../generated/nnsvg.md) |
| `spatial_variance_ratio` | `production` | `native` | Variance retained after local spatial averaging. | [spatial_variance_ratio](../generated/spatial_variance_ratio.md) |
| `spatialde` | `validated` | `external` | SpatialDE Gaussian-process test for spatially variable genes. | [spatialde](../generated/spatialde.md) |

## Decision notes

### `gearys_c`

- Fast classical spatial statistics with FDR hooks.
- Per-gene Geary C converted to a positive spatial-association score.
- Full page: [gearys_c](../generated/gearys_c.md)

### `morans_i`

- Fast classical spatial statistics with FDR hooks.
- Per-gene Moran's I spatial autocorrelation on a k-NN graph.
- Full page: [morans_i](../generated/morans_i.md)

### `nnsvg`

- Fast classical spatial statistics with FDR hooks.
- nnSVG nearest-neighbour Gaussian-process SVG detection (Bioconductor).
- Full page: [nnsvg](../generated/nnsvg.md)

### `spatial_variance_ratio`

- Fast classical spatial statistics with FDR hooks.
- Variance retained after local spatial averaging.
- Full page: [spatial_variance_ratio](../generated/spatial_variance_ratio.md)

### `spatialde`

- Rank genes by spatial autocorrelation or spatial variance.
- SpatialDE Gaussian-process test for spatially variable genes.
- Requires external backend(s): `SpatialDE, NaiveDE`.
- Full page: [spatialde](../generated/spatialde.md)

### `weave_anisotropy_svg`

- Research SVG variants — dual-report against morans_i.
- Directional spatial association contrast across four orientation sectors.
- Research incubator — do not treat as a production recommendation.
- Full page: [weave_anisotropy_svg](../generated/weave_anisotropy_svg.md)

### `weave_bootstrap_robust_svg`

- Research SVG variants — dual-report against morans_i.
- Spatial association ranked by deterministic bootstrap stability.
- Research incubator — do not treat as a production recommendation.
- Full page: [weave_bootstrap_robust_svg](../generated/weave_bootstrap_robust_svg.md)

### `weave_boundary_svg`

- Research SVG variants — dual-report against morans_i.
- Genes whose local expression jumps coincide with multigene spatial boundaries.
- Research incubator — do not treat as a production recommendation.
- Full page: [weave_boundary_svg](../generated/weave_boundary_svg.md)
